name: Container Houses
description:
SAMAN's container house range runs from compact single-container units to large multi-container homes, priced from around ₹5 lakh to ₹56 lakh — so the real question isn't what a container house is, it's which one fits your plot, family size and budget. This page maps all 14 container houses to the job each does best and shows the starting price for every one, so you can shortlist before you call.

Which container house fits your budget and family size?

Start with what you can spend, then match the space you need. For the lowest budget, under ₹10 lakh, the Luxury Container Houses (₹5,15,000), Prefab Container Homes (₹8,65,000) and Cargo Container House (₹9,25,000) cover compact, single-container living. In the ₹12–14 lakh band, the Tiny Container Homes (₹12,15,000), Storage Container House (₹13,25,000) and Prefabricated Container House (₹13,25,000) suit small homes and convert-to-home builds. Between ₹21 and ₹28 lakh, the Shipping Container Tiny House (₹21,55,000), Inexpensive Container Homes (₹25,35,000), Prefabricated Container Home (₹25,45,000) and Modern Container Home (₹27,95,000) give you larger, fully finished living space. From ₹30 lakh up, the Prebuilt Container Home (₹34,45,000), Affordable Container Homes (₹36,66,000) and the large, multi-container Shipping Container Homes (₹56,35,000) sit at the top of the range. Tap any unit to see its full specification.

Container house price range by type

This price list sets the starting point for a representative unit in each part of the range, so you can match a budget to a configuration at a glance.
Container house type Best suited to Price (from)
Luxury Container Houses Smallest budget, compact single unit ₹5,15,000
Cargo Container House Durable, heavy-use compact home ₹9,25,000
Tiny Container Homes Compact tiny-home living ₹12,15,000
Prefabricated Container House Factory-fitted, delivered ready ₹13,25,000
Shipping Container Tiny House Larger single-container home ₹21,55,000
Prefabricated Container Home Fitted multi-room home ₹25,45,000
Modern Container Home Design-led contemporary living ₹27,95,000
Shipping Container Homes Large multi-container family home ₹56,35,000

How much does a container house cost in India?

A container house in India costs from around ₹5 lakh to ₹56 lakh at SAMAN, set mainly by its size and how it is fitted out. A compact single-container unit sits at the lower end; a large, multi-container, fully finished family home sits at the top. Your plot, interior fit-out and the number of containers decide where you land.

Container house manufacturer, custom builds & delivery

Every container house here is fabricated in-house at SAMAN's Bangalore facility rather than bought in and resold, so steel grade, finish and warranty stay consistent across the whole range. As a container house manufacturer supplying across India since 2016, SAMAN has delivered 500+ portable and container units to 15+ states. You can buy any unit on this page as listed, configure a custom size and layout to suit your plot, or start from the flagship container house and scale up. Every build is made to order and delivered Pan-India.

Container house buyer FAQs

How much does a container house cost?

SAMAN's container houses start at about ₹5 lakh for the most compact single-container unit and reach around ₹56 lakh for a large multi-container family home. What you pay depends on size, interior fit-out and how many containers are joined or stacked.

Where can I buy a container house?

You can buy any of the 14 container houses listed on this page directly from SAMAN. Choose a unit, request a quote, and we fabricate to order and deliver Pan-India from our Bangalore and Greater Noida units.

What size container do you need for a 3-bedroom house?

A 3-bedroom container house usually needs two or more 40 ft containers joined or stacked. Our larger multi-container homes are built for this — share your layout and we'll size the build to your bedroom and plot requirements.

What's the difference between a prefabricated container home and a prefabricated container house?

Both are factory-built before delivery. The Prefabricated Container Home leans to a finished, multi-room residential fit-out, while the Prefabricated Container House is the more compact, ready-to-place build at a lower entry price — pick by how much fitted space you need.

Get a quote

Talk to us about any container house in the range. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 or WhatsApp +91 88616 22859. Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 or WhatsApp +91 97089 89937.
